# Structure Fixture Source Notes

These fixtures are selected from the archived 2D Pretty Lattice project for the
first local GUI structure-preview slice. They are small, ordered, fully occupied
cells written by hand from common crystallographic motifs or synthetic
coordinates.

- `trigonal_rhombohedral_al2o3.cif`: synthetic rhombohedral-metric trigonal
  Al/O CIF fixture with equal cell lengths and equal non-90 degree angles.
- `binary_nacl.poscar`: minimal rock-salt-like NaCl conventional cell in POSCAR
  format.

The fixtures are intentionally not authoritative reference structures. They are
stable local tests for file parsing, scene construction, and upload API behavior.
